name: Chipped Beef Supreme
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 8 ounces of cream cheese and 2 tablespoons of milk in a bowl over low heat.
2. Add the chopped green pepper, minced onion, 3 ounces of chipped beef (shredded), and 1/2 cup of sour cream to the mixture.
3. Mix well until all ingredients are combined.
4. Allow the dish to cool completely before serving.
5. Store in the refrigerator for at least 12 hours before consuming for best flavor.
6. Serve with a variety of crackers or enjoy it cold or warm.
